title: comm_pointers: three identical match arms
description: TransportInner::comm_pointers() has three match arms whose bodies are character-for-character identical — same three field accesses, same pointer casts, only the concrete type differs. Because TcpInner/UdsInner/ShmInner share the same field layout (transport_cb, transport_ctx, transport_cfg) a macro_rules! macro (or a private sealed trait) over the three inner types would express this once and eliminate the copy-paste maintenance hazard. Suggested rewrite: define macro comm_ptr_arm!($inner:ident) { (&$inner.transport_cb as *const _, &mut $inner.transport_ctx as *mut _ as *mut c_void, &$inner.transport_cfg as *const _ as *const c_void) } and invoke it in each arm.
